_comment: DirtyBird Best Configuration - Updated 2026-01-25 (24T Optimization Complete)
_benchmark_notes: Thread sweep + feature testing, 3 runs each, 60s duration. 24 threads optimal for i7-13700HX.

best_throughput._note: 24 threads matches CPU cores (8P + 8E = 24 logical), optimal for this workload

best_balance.reason: Simple config is best - SA tuning actually hurts performance

most_stable._note: Best stability (CV 2.49%) but sacrifices ~2 KH/s throughput

recommended_production.reason: Simple --no-lock with 24 threads achieves best throughput (18.66 KH/s)

alternative_stable.reason: Maximum stability (CV 2.49%) if variance is critical

sa_prefetch_sweep_results._insight: Larger text/bucket prefetch (16+) dramatically improves stability from CV 6% to CV 2.5%

key_findings.spsa_impact: SPSA provides 10-15x performance improvement over baseline (93% of hash time)
key_findings.optimal_threads: 24 threads = CPU cores is optimal (8P + 8E = 24 logical on i7-13700HX)
key_findings.sa_tune_hurts: --sa-tune actually reduces throughput on this CPU (18.59 vs 18.66 KH/s)
key_findings.pcore_only_hurts: P-cores-only mode significantly hurts performance (14.97 vs 18.66 KH/s)
key_findings.avx512_not_viable: x86-64-v4 (AVX-512) crashes on hybrid CPUs - E-cores don't support AVX-512
key_findings.cache_batch_warning: --cache-batch disables SPSA benefits, reducing hashrate to ~1.2 KH/s

comparison_vs_targets.status: COMPETITIVE OR AHEAD - DirtyBird exceeds DeroLuna actual performance
comparison_vs_targets.critical_finding: SPSA library is IDENTICAL between TNN, DirtyBird, and DeroLuna (same git commit). The 22 KH/s figure was likely from different hardware or overstated.

deep_investigation_results._method: 6 parallel agents analyzing SPSA, DeroLuna, core affinity, and profiling

spsa_library_analysis.multi_versioning: 7 variants per hot function (avx512f, avx512-full, znver4, znver5, avx2, sse2, default)
spsa_library_analysis.insight: znver builds are AMD-optimized, no Intel Alder/Raptor Lake specific build available

deroluna_advantages.rc4: CRYPTOGAMS x86-64 assembly (+5-10% vs OpenSSL generic)
deroluna_advantages.binary_size: 3.3 MB vs DirtyBird 14.1 MB (better I-cache locality)

critical_discovery.spsa_library_identical: TNN, DirtyBird, and DeroLuna ALL use same SPSA (commit 8938667bfa)
critical_discovery.22khs_explanation: The 22 KH/s figure was likely from different hardware or overstated benchmarks

original_gap_analysis_invalidated: SPSA library differences: INVALIDATED - libraries are identical
znver vs x86 optimization: INVALIDATED - same library, runtime dispatch
15% gap: INVALIDATED - actual gap is ~0% or DirtyBird is ahead
what_was_fully_optimized: SA prefetch tuning: tested, hurts performance
AVX-512 build: crashes on hybrid CPU (E-cores lack support)

remaining_optimization_paths.medium_term: Port CRYPTOGAMS RC4 + SIMD Salsa20 for ~1-2% gain
remaining_optimization_paths.long_term: Request Intel-optimized SPSA build from Tritonn204, or obtain source
